titleStmt.title: SII 10.90: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 90. (A.R. No. 631 of 1920.) ON A STONE CALLED PŌTURĀJU SET UP IN FRONT OF THE TEMPLE OF PUTTĀLAMMA, AMRITALŪRU, TENALI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT. Ś. 1054.

summary.p: States that the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Gōṅkaya Bōya (?) lord of the 480 villages and servant of Rājēndra-Chōḍa made a gift of 50 sheep for the upkeep of a perpetual lamp in the temple of Amritīśvara at Amutunūru.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī samadhigata
paṁcamahāśabda ma
hāmaṇḍalēśvara pra
tāpamahēśvara cā
lukyarājyabhavanamū
la staṁbha śuṁbhajriṁ
bhitaripumadastaṁbha
cu(ca)tartthakulavanajava
namārttaṇḍa calamartti
gaṇḍa rājēṁdracōḍadēva
divyaśrīpādapadmārādhaka
parabalasādhaka catuśśatā
sītigrāmāvanīvallabha
sahakāravallabha bhaṇḍa
nabhīma bhuvanābhirāma
Āhavarakkasa vikramakarkaśa
dāyagajasiṁgha sāhasō
ttuṁgga nāmādi samasta

praśastisahita śrīmanmahā
maṇḍalēśvara gōṁkkayabō
yu ṇḍaṁggarikamunne
koḍuku pa vanaśa
kavarṣaṁbulu 1054
gu nēṁṭi kārttikabahala
dvādaśiyu nādivāra
muna Amutunūri A
mritīśvaradēvaraku nakhaṇḍa
varttidīpamunaku grāma
cakravartti nityamāneṇḍu ne
yi vōyaṁgalavāru guṁḍa
bōyini koḍku Aṁga
rikasōmevasamunaṁ
beṭṭina goṟiyalu Eṁbha
di vīni nācaṁdrārkamu
putrapautrānīkamu
naḍapaṁgalavāru
Digital edition of SII 10.90 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
